1694700.name: Masterpiece Studio Pro
1694700.description:
Create useable, real-time ready 3D avatars, characters and props for games, animations and the metaverse. Sculpt, remesh, autoUV, texture, rig, skin and animate your models in one intuitive, immersive product. See full feature details below.

FREE IS ABOUT BUILDING COMMUNITY


With the Free version, you can create with the full 3D pipeline for as long as you want, for non-commercial use!

All content exported by Free users is uploaded to the Public Gallery and also downloaded locally to their machine. Content in the Public Gallery is available for anyone to be inspired by, to download, and to use and remix for non-commercial reasons. Paying users can use the content in the public gallery for commercial purposes, as long as it is substantively remixed.

If owning your exported work and keeping it private is important to you, please consider supporting our product development, as well as the further development of the community, by upgrading to a paid license.

We believe this Free version will help showcase your work, bring value to other creatives, and help build the creative community of the future!

See Free License details here:



If you want to bypass the Public Gallery at export, or use your creations for commercial work, we have an affordable Freelancer subscription plan. With a commercial license, you can export privately, and get priority support.

MASTERPIECE STUDIO PRO includes:


MASTERPIECE CREATOR
Create 3D concepts and polished 3D sculpts, texture them and prepare them for production with mesh clean-up tools.



Key Features:
  • Clay sculpting for creating 3D models
  • Stamps for quickly sketching out ideas
  • Mesh drawing tools for sketching and building structures with hard edges
  • Scene graph for organizing layers
  • Precision and control tools like snapping grid, guides, gizmo, mirror and motion smoothing
  • Industry-leading mesh preparation tools: clean-up, optimize, and auto-UV your models using a simple interface
  • Texture painting tools to add color, texture, height, normal and emissive details to the surface of your model

MASTERPIECE MOTION
Rig, skin and animate your models and export to your favorite creative programs.



Key Features:
  • Draw rigs easily in an immersive space, paste and reproportion standard rigs, or use a powerful auto-rigger for humanoids
  • Skin quickly and easily with painting tools, or use our powerful auto-skinner and make fine adjustments
  • Animate your model with your hands by moving the rig using IK and FK and our pose-to-pose timeline
  • Create facial blendshapes and morph objects with our mesh move tool
  • Export your assets with baked animations and bring them into your favorite 3D programs for animation or rendering
